metadata.instruction:
Read the following sentence clearly at a natural pace:

  "Please call Stella and ask her to bring these things
   with her from the store."
metadata.reference_sentence: please call stella and ask her to bring these things with her from the store

metrics.transcript: Please call Stella and ask her to bring these things with her from the store.

metadata.instruction: Say "pa-ta-ka" 5 times clearly, at a steady pace.

metrics.transcript: Paa taa taa taa taa taa taa taa taa taa taa taa taa taa.

metadata.instruction: Describe the room you are sitting in right now.

metrics.transcript: Speak naturally for about 20 seconds. There's no right or wrong answer.
